name: Slack Event → AI Analysis → Slack Reply
description: Listens for Slack events, extracts the message, runs it through an LLM for analysis or response generation, and posts the result back to Slack.

config.SYSTEM_PROMPT: You are a helpful assistant. Respond concisely.

required_secrets.description: Slack app signing secret for webhook verification
Slack bot token with chat:write scope
LLM provider API key (e.g. Anthropic or OpenAI)

replacements.config_delta: Replace SIGNING_SECRET_PATH+EVENT_TYPES with OAUTH_TOKEN_SECRET+WATCH_LABELS (e.g. ['INBOX']). Required secret: google/gmail_oauth_token instead of slack/signing_secret. Use to trigger AI analysis on incoming email.
Replace CHANNEL with TO+SUBJECT+BODY. Required secret: google/gmail_oauth_token added; slack/bot_token no longer needed. Use when the AI response should be delivered via email rather than Slack.
Replace CHANNEL+BOT_TOKEN with WEBHOOK_URL_SECRET='teams/webhook_url'. Required secret: teams/webhook_url instead of slack/bot_token. Use when your team's primary chat platform is Microsoft Teams.
